body.title: CLOSED: Wire graph_integrator and preparse_router into reading pipeline
body.result: implement_skipped: HYPOTHESIZE produced an invalid old_string and no edit was applied — ticket needs re-queue with a cor
body.description:
Two D230/D231-era cognition modules are built but unconnected to any caller. Both have example usage in their own docstrings indicating intended wiring points:
- graph_integrator.py: reads indexed content, builds co-occurrence edges. Entry: integrate_graph(). Should be called from reading pipeline after a chunk is indexed.
- preparse_router.py: distributed dispatcher for atomic preparse chunks. Entry point unclear until audit classifies it — gate on T-cognition-module-audit for classification first.

**Affected files:** TBD — discovery step. Likely reading_tool.py or inbound message handling path for preparse_router.
**Design rules:** docs-in-code. no-new-memory-schemas.
**Scope boundary:** IN: identify call sites, wire both modules, verify indexing and preparse still work. OUT: modifying the modules themselves, D230/D231 feature work beyond wiring.
**Test plan:** Integration test: trigger a reading job, verify graph_integrator deposits edges. Trigger an inbound message, verify preparse_router is invoked. Full suite after wiring.
